Module com.example._0tazo
Package com.example._0tazo.model

Class CardTest

java.lang.Object
com.example._0tazo.model.CardTest
@DisplayName("Card") class CardTest extends Object
Unit tests for Card.

Covers Card.getValue(int) for every rank category, Ace value selection logic, and Card.isPlayable(int) near the 50-point limit.
